homePage.title: Home
homePage.headerDescription: While the use of Information Technologies is causing many harm on a global level, I believe it can help us rebuilding a better and more sustainable world. I am focused on this misson, helping sustainable companies across the globe.
portfolioPage.title: Portfolio
portfolioPage.headerDescription: Here, you can find a list of projects I have been working on during the last years. I have started to focus on sustainablity not long ago, this is why you can find all kind of experiences here.
values.desc1: I design solutions to optimize speed, computation and storage to reduce impact on the planet and cost for the customers.
values.desc2: I believe communication is the key to carry out any project successfully. I say inconvenient truths early rather than waiting until it is too late.
values.desc3: I treat all my customers as equals. All the work I realize have the same importance and quality standards. I like to see myself as part of development team of the companies I work for.
values.desc4: My goal is to help the world to be a better place by helping sustainable businesses. I refuse all projects not aligned with my values.
services.body1: I started being more Backend focused, from database to deliver a response. I have been responsible for services handling thousands of requests per seconds.
services.skills1: Java, Php, GoLang, Database Administration (SQL, MongoDb), RestApis
services.body2: During the years, I have diversified and learnt new Front-End framweorks.
services.skills2: React, Gatsby, Vue.js, jQuery, HTML5 & CSS3
services.body3: Having worked with many companies with very different profiles, I can develop and setup any kind of environments, from self hosted monolyth to cloud-based microservices with continuous deployment.
services.skills3: AWS, GCP, Kubernetes, Docker, Jenkins, CI Pipelines
services.body4: Knowing what happens in your platform is key to detect any anomaly. Analytics help to gain more confidence in the products and make sure things are working.
services.skills4: Google Analytics, Elastic Search, Kibana, Alerting
services.body5: Ecommerce CMS can be a nightmare sometimes when you want to do something very basic, I have spent many hours improving ecommerce sites and developing plugins to make ecommerce sites working exactly as expected.
services.skills5: Speed Optimization, Woocommerce, Prestashop, SEO, Json+LD
about.description1: After years working as a Full Stack developer for several companies <2>(Sopra Steria, Criteo, King—AKA Candy Crush...)</2>, I decided to leave this business world and start working exclusively for sustainable businesses.
about.description2: After a 1 year trip around Asia with my life partner, we co-founded <2>Luffa Shop</2>, an online store focused on reducing trash for Spanish households. In 3 years we planted 3 500+ trees and avoided 15 000+ kg of plastic waste!
about.description3: During all this time, I have acquired a wide range of technical and business knowledge, which enables me to work through many different business situation.
